command:
git commit -m t0027_literature_survey_morphology_ds_modeling [implementation]: add 5 priority-3 paper assets, hitting 15-paper target

Build paper assets for the priority-3 batch:
- 10.7554_eLife.81533 (Srivastava 2022): SAC bipolar-input kinetic tiling proximal-sustained -> distal-transient
- 10.1371_journal.pcbi.1000877 (Cuntz 2010): TREES toolbox / centripetal-branch-ordering morphology generator
- 10.1523_JNEUROSCI.17-16-06023.1997 (Single 1997): first compartmental fly VS/CH/H1 LPTC model with postsynaptic E-I shunting
- 10.1038_s41467-024-46234-7 (Aldor 2024): SAC Kv3+mGluR2 division-of-labor; anatomical not morphological
- 10.1523_JNEUROSCI.4013-15.2016 (Poleg-Polsky 2016): BC presynaptic contrast heterogeneity pre-compensates SAC nonlinearity

All five PDFs successfully retrieved (eLife, PLoS, JNeurosci open mirror, Nature Comms,
EuropePMC). Subagents flagged three corrections to the task brief during retrieval:
(1) Srivastava2022 has 10 authors not 6 -- two Aarhus co-authors (Yonehara group) were
omitted; (2) Single1997 reports VS/CH/H1 cells, not HS cells; (3) Aldor2024 author list
in CrossRef is Ledesma/Ding/Oosterboer/Huang/Chen/Wang/Lin/Wei -- citation_key kept as
Aldor2024 per spec but details.json reflects the actual authors. All summaries meet the
spec >=500-word + 9-section bar; all 15 papers (5 priority-1 + 5 priority-2 + 5
priority-3) now in place. Stop criterion satisfied: at target (12-25, target ~15).
